---
title: "Data analysis"
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - "\\usepackage{makecell}"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(afex)
library(emmeans)
library(kableExtra)

theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 15) + theme(legend.position = "bottom"))
afex::afex_options(type = 3)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Load + prepare data
# -----------------------------
truth_ratings <- read_csv("final_failed.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id     = factor(participant_id),
    repetition_numeric = as.numeric(repetition_times),
    repetition_factor  = factor(repetition_times, levels = c(0, 1, 9, 18, 27)),
    truth_score        = as.numeric(truth_score)
  )

rep_levels <- c("0", "1", "9", "18", "27")

# -----------------------------
# Helper: within-subject d (paper footnote)
# d = |m1 - m2| / sqrt(s1^2 + s2^2 - 2*r*s1*s2)
# -----------------------------
d_within_r <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- complete.cases(x, y)
  x <- x[ok]; y <- y[ok]
  m1 <- mean(x); m2 <- mean(y)
  s1 <- sd(x);   s2 <- sd(y)
  r  <- cor(x, y)
  denom <- sqrt(s1^2 + s2^2 - 2 * r * s1 * s2)
  abs(m1 - m2) / denom
}

# -----------------------------
# 1) Demographics: age summary
# -----------------------------
gender_summary <- truth_ratings %>% 
  distinct(participant_id, gender) %>%
  count(gender)

gender_summary


age_summary <- truth_ratings %>%
  distinct(participant_id, age) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_age   = sd(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_age  = min(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age  = max(age, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

age_summary

# -----------------------------
# 2) Matched-pairs t-test: repeated (collapsed across >0) vs new (0)
# -----------------------------
by_participant_cond <- truth_ratings %>%
  group_by(participant_id, repetition_numeric) %>%
  summarise(mean_truth = mean(truth_score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

by_participant_repeated_vs_new <- by_participant_cond %>%
  mutate(item_type = if_else(repetition_numeric == 0, "new", "repeated")) %>%
  group_by(participant_id, item_type) %>%
  summarise(mean_truth = mean(mean_truth, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = item_type, values_from = mean_truth)

tt_repeated_vs_new <- t.test(
  by_participant_repeated_vs_new$repeated,
  by_participant_repeated_vs_new$new,
  paired = TRUE
)

tt_repeated_vs_new

d_repeated_vs_new <- d_within_r(
  by_participant_repeated_vs_new$repeated,
  by_participant_repeated_vs_new$new
)

d_repeated_vs_new

msd_repeated_new <- by_participant_repeated_vs_new %>%
  summarise(
    M_repeated  = mean(repeated, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_repeated = sd(repeated, na.rm = TRUE),
    M_new       = mean(new, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_new      = sd(new, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

msd_repeated_new

# -----------------------------
# 3) Per-participant correlations: linear vs log(reps + 1)
# -----------------------------
wide_means <- by_participant_cond %>%
  mutate(rep_chr = as.character(repetition_numeric)) %>%
  select(participant_id, rep_chr, mean_truth) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = rep_chr, values_from = mean_truth)

stopifnot(all(rep_levels %in% names(wide_means)))

rep_num <- as.numeric(rep_levels) + 1
rep_log <- log(rep_num)

corrs <- wide_means %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    r_linear = {
      y <- c_across(all_of(rep_levels))
      if (anyNA(y)) NA_real_ else cor(y, rep_num)
    },
    r_log = {
      y <- c_across(all_of(rep_levels))
      if (anyNA(y)) NA_real_ else cor(y, rep_log)
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

corr_summary <- corrs %>%
  summarise(
    mean_r_linear = mean(r_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_r_linear   = sd(r_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_r_linear  = min(r_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_r_linear  = max(r_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_pos_linear = mean(r_linear > 0, na.rm = TRUE),

    mean_r_log = mean(r_log, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_r_log   = sd(r_log, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_r_log  = min(r_log, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_r_log  = max(r_log, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_pos_log = mean(r_log > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

as.data.frame(corr_summary)

# Number of participants with r_linear > 0
n_linear_pos <- sum(corrs$r_linear > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

# Total valid participants (non-missing r_linear)
n_total <- sum(!is.na(corrs$r_linear))

# Proportion (often reported in papers)
prop_linear_pos <- n_linear_pos / n_total

n_linear_pos
n_total
prop_linear_pos


tt_corr <- t.test(abs(corrs$r_log), abs(corrs$r_linear), paired = TRUE)
tt_corr

diff_r <- abs(corrs$r_log) - abs(corrs$r_linear)
d_dz_corr <- mean(diff_r, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(diff_r, na.rm = TRUE)
d_dz_corr

##
# graph
##

# Compute means + CI using numeric repetitions
means_plot <- truth_ratings %>%
  group_by(repetition_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_truth = mean(truth_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(truth_score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    ci95 = qt(0.975, df = n() - 1) * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Plot with numeric scale + regular ticks
ggplot(means_plot, aes(x = repetition_numeric, y = mean_truth)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_truth - ci95,
                    ymax = mean_truth + ci95),
                width = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 27, by = 3),
    limits = c(0, 27)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3, 5.5)) + # update this when changing variation
  labs(
    x = "Number of repetitions",
    y = "Mean truth rating"
  ) +
  theme_classic()




# -----------------------------
# 4) RM ANOVA + Bonferroni pairwise comparisons
# -----------------------------
aov_rm <- aov_car(
  truth_score ~ repetition_factor + Error(participant_id / repetition_factor),
  data = truth_ratings,
  factorize = FALSE
)

aov_rm

emm_rep <- emmeans(aov_rm, ~ repetition_factor)

pairs_bonf <- pairs(emm_rep, adjust = "bonferroni") %>%
  summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame()

pairs_bonf

# Build robust numeric p-value lookup for (a,b) keys like "0||1"
pairs_bonf2 <- pairs_bonf %>%
  tidyr::extract(
    contrast,
    into = c("a_raw", "b_raw"),
    regex = "^\\s*(.*?)\\s*-\\s*(.*?)\\s*$",
    remove = FALSE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    a = stringr::str_extract(a_raw, "\\d+"),
    b = stringr::str_extract(b_raw, "\\d+"),
    key = paste(a, b, sep = "||"),
    p_num = as.numeric(p.value)
  )

p_lookup <- setNames(pairs_bonf2$p_num, pairs_bonf2$key)

get_p_bonf <- function(a, b, lookup) {
  key1 <- paste(a, b, sep = "||")
  key2 <- paste(b, a, sep = "||")

  p1 <- lookup[key1]
  if (length(p1) == 1 && !is.na(p1)) return(unname(p1))

  p2 <- lookup[key2]
  if (length(p2) == 1 && !is.na(p2)) return(unname(p2))

  NA_real_
}

# -----------------------------
# 5) Table 2-style output (M/SD header + triangular d matrix)
# -----------------------------
desc_by_cond <- truth_ratings %>%
  group_by(repetition_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    M = mean(truth_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(truth_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(repetition_factor = as.character(repetition_factor))

msd_header <- desc_by_cond %>%
  mutate(msd = sprintf("\\makecell{M = %.2f \\\\ SD = %.2f}", M, SD)) %>%
  select(repetition_factor, msd) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = repetition_factor, values_from = msd) %>%
  as.data.frame()

cell_matrix <- matrix("",
  nrow = length(rep_levels),
  ncol = length(rep_levels),
  dimnames = list(rep_levels, rep_levels)
)

for (i in seq_along(rep_levels)) {
  for (j in seq_along(rep_levels)) {
    if (i == j) {
      cell_matrix[i, j] <- "–"
    } else if (i < j) {
      a <- rep_levels[i]
      b <- rep_levels[j]

      d_val <- d_within_r(wide_means[[a]], wide_means[[b]])
      p_val <- get_p_bonf(a, b, p_lookup)
      is_sig <- !is.na(p_val) && p_val < 0.05

      cell_txt <- sprintf("d = %.2f%s", d_val, if (is_sig) "*" else "")
      if (is_sig) cell_txt <- paste0("\\textbf{", cell_txt, "}")

      cell_matrix[i, j] <- cell_txt
    }
  }
}

d_table_formatted <- as.data.frame(cell_matrix)

final_table <- bind_rows(
  tibble(` ` = "Ms and SDs of truth ratings") %>% bind_cols(msd_header),
  tibble(` ` = rownames(d_table_formatted)) %>% bind_cols(d_table_formatted)
) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))

knitr::kable(final_table, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE,
             escape = FALSE, align = "lccccc") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Number of Session 1 repetitions" = 5))
```
